name: codex

edits.disables: Codex usage analytics sent to OpenAI

persistent_files.note: Local activity DB — can exceed 500MB. Opt-out stops new sends but existing rows stay.
Raw conversation log; plaintext prompts and responses.
Persistent UUID used to correlate sessions. Delete to rotate identity (not covered by opt-out).

notes: No env-var wrapper — must edit config.toml directly.
Profile-scoped override exists: profiles.<name>.analytics.enabled = false. If config.toml has a [profiles.*] section, apply there too.
Opt-out stops new sends; existing sqlite/jsonl logs persist and should be reviewed separately.
